reviews.review_description: I'm grateful for the demo, saved me buying this. The puzzles seem intriguing and the graphics are good, but the movement between items gave me such horrible motion sickness I literally nearly threw up. Hard pass.

developer_response.body: If you are prone to motion sickness, please try Holding Trigger to Move only forward. This way you can counter easily motion sickness, as side movement with touch controls might disturb you.

reviews.review_description: I played this demo for about half an hour. I thought the game was very fun and well done. I loved the environment and puzzles. I did have some trouble maneuvering . That being said the movement made me queasy. When I stopped I felt so sick I genuinely thought I was going to vomit. It’s a shame I would have loved to continue but it’s not worth it.

Great demo! I surely enjoyed it.
The controls need a little work especially the turning. But if you just go forward, and use your head to literally turn around there was no problem. Too much movement can lead you to motion sickness. But that wasn’t too much of a problem for me
